problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Combining Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
